reviews.review_description: This was my first vr game and it let me down gameplay was clunky there was no sit down mode and horrible sickness effects
I was playing during 4 weeks and it's an amazing sport from the classic soccer game. You train your skills like a real football player. For me works perfectly.
Not played it but I think it would be better to play with people
I just got the game and I thought it was going to be fun but I couldn’t even get in because of the wait.

reviews.review_title: BRO why do I have to wait more then 20m
reviews.review_description:
I have to wait more then 20min 


Please fix this problem!
The game freeze whenever I opened the game. Literally unplayable
Noticed another on here saying they can’t get past the loading screen, I have the same issue, trying to play for the first time and just not happening.
I downloaded the game and I get kicked out or I stay at the loading screen for minutes and I just give up

reviews.review_title: Can't play it for some reason
reviews.review_description: I was playing it a few months ago but now I can't even get past the loading screen
But I can't focus at all bc of all the balls

reviews.review_title: To many balls i cant focus at all
reviews.review_description: Its a good game but they shoot to many balls
10 balls at once i cant even focus uninstalled immediately

reviews.review_title: Can't wait for the full experience
reviews.review_description:
This is fun to play and it's a great workout as well. Can't wait till they release the full thing. And I just ranked #5 in the world rankings for the keeper mode. BOOM! (*Drops mic)

Update: still love this game. played almost every day so far. Now ranked #2 worldwide keeper mode reppin USA all the way!
Hey Dev when is the full version coming out and what that look like?

I love the game, it's so fun and you get to both block and score goals. It's also so fun to play the world cup and be any national team you want and get to play goalkeeper and striker. I also like that there is separate modes for goalkeeper and striker.

I absolutely love this game. I just downloaded it and started to play in my room and quickly realized that I definitely need more room if I truly want to enjoy the game in all its glory, so I played outside and it was love at first play. This game definitely deserves ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ because I absolutely love everything in this game. Sure it was challenging and had to take breaks in between games, because I was sweating so much and was definitely out of breath after each game, nonetheless it’s exceptionally enjoyable and truly immersive that I kept playing one game after another until I was too tired to play. I have quite a lot of VR games, but I never knew how physically immersive a VR game can be until I played this game. I was truly fascinated with everything in the game from the lounge area which was really well designed and very functional which was so much fun to explore and believe me I explored all the areas I can to the games themselves which has impeccable mechanics and very well designed that it really made me feel like I’m really on the field playing soccer/football. I’ve never played the keeper before, but with this game I got a taste of what it’s like and it really blew my mind how the balls are coming from all directions and just amazed how realistic all the shots are and can’t help but be awestruck because these are the kinds of shots that I often see when watching professional games and it’s mind blowing to be at the receiving end of those shots especially when they’re coming from all directions in different heights and speed. I can’t wait to play some more and hopefully I’ll gradually get better at it and last much longer the more I play.

I can’t thank the developers enough for all their hard work and genius in creating such an astounding game which is truly immersive and so much enjoyable and entertaining to play. A heartfelt thank you devs for this exemplary game and thank you so much again for sharing your passion for the amazing game of football which is truly evident in this game. Cheers for your continued success and for bringing so much joy to all soccer/football fans.🥂⚽️💐

I experienced be football matches with VR with move sensor, so much fun and entertaining! It shows both home exercises, group matches and professional training programs. It has tremendous potential to become a major player in the market! LOVE it!
